Auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.

Dashboard.title: Control Center
Dashboard.description: Welcome to your organization's control center.

Validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
Validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
Validation.orgNameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters long.
Validation.stringMin: Must be at least 2 characters long.
Validation.invalidSlug: Slug can only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (-).

Register.title: Create Account
Register.loginLink: Already have an account? Sign in

ForgotPassword.title: Recover Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.successMessage: If the email exists, you will receive a link shortly.

ResetPassword.title: New Password
ResetPassword.description: Enter your new password to regain access.
ResetPassword.successMessage: Password updated successfully. You can now sign in.

SettingsLayout.title: Settings
SettingsLayout.description: Manage your account, preferences, and workspace.

SettingsProfile.title: General Profile
SettingsProfile.description: Update your personal information and system preferences.
SettingsProfile.successMessage: Your profile has been updated successfully.

SettingsSecurity.title: Security
SettingsSecurity.description: Ensure you are using a long, secure password.
SettingsSecurity.successMessage: Your password has been updated successfully.

SettingsOrg.title: Organization Settings
SettingsOrg.description: Manage the public name and identifier of your workspace.
SettingsOrg.orgSlugDescription: Unique identifier used in URLs (e.g., my-company).

SettingsMembers.title: Members
SettingsMembers.description: Manage who has access to this organization and their permission levels.
SettingsMembers.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member?
SettingsMembers.noMembersFound: No members found in this organization.

Invitations.inviteDescription: Send an email invitation to add a new member to your workspace.

InviteAccept.title: Join the Organization
InviteAccept.description: You are one step away from collaborating with your team. Create a secure password to get started.
InviteAccept.invalidTokenDescription: The invitation link is missing or incorrect. Please ask your administrator for a new invitation.
InviteAccept.successMessage: Account created successfully! You can now log in.
